headline: What Happens When AI Agents Go Rogue?
summary: Spend enough time around cybersecurity types, and questions like the one above might feel like lighthearted chitchat.  The annual confab is one of the largest gatherings of cybersecurity professionals, and the timing of this year’s gathering proved particularly apt.  Near the end of the week, an internal document from Anthropic leaked to the public, about a new AI model so powerful that it poses significant cybersecurity risks because of its potential to become a tool for hackers.

headline: Morgan Stanley Picks Top 5 Cybersecurity Stocks to Buy with Up to 65% Upside

headline: Palo Alto’s CEO Said ‘AI Must Fight AI’ — Then Put $10 Million Behind It
summary: Palo Alto Networks (NASDAQ:PANW) CEO Nikesh Arora published an op-ed on March 30, 2026, titled “Weaponized Intelligence” that cuts to the heart of where cybersecurity is heading.
